languages.text: Дальнейший осмотр мостика позволяет сложить разрозненные свидетельства в цельную картину. Судно стало жертвой друкари — вырезав защитников, ксеносы увели в плен весь экипаж за исключением офицеров. Их стоны боли и доносились из динамиков мостика — бездушное свидетельство чудовищных пыток, которым друкари подвергли людей перед тем как исчезнуть.

traits.locale_text: Дальнейший осмотр мостика позволяет сложить разрозненные свидетельства в цельную картину. Судно стало жертвой друкари — вырезав защитников, ксеносы увели в плен весь экипаж за исключением офицеров. Их стоны боли и доносились из динамиков мостика — бездушное свидетельство чудовищных пыток, которым друкари подвергли людей перед тем как исчезнуть.

languages.text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.
languages.original_text: Дальнейший осмотр мостика позволяет сложить разрозненные свидетельства в цельную картину. Судно стало жертвой друкари — вырезав защитников, ксеносы увели в плен весь экипаж за исключением офицеров. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

languages.text: 进一步检查舰桥后，零散的线索终于拼凑成完整的真相。这艘船曾落入黑暗灵族的魔爪——这些异形屠杀了守军之后，俘虏了所有船员，唯独留下了军官。他们痛苦的呻吟在舰桥的扬声器中回荡着，无情地证明了黑暗灵族在消失前，对这些人施加了何等恐怖的折磨。
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

traits.locale_text: 进一步检查舰桥后，零散的线索终于拼凑成完整的真相。这艘船曾落入黑暗灵族的魔爪——这些异形屠杀了守军之后，俘虏了所有船员，唯独留下了军官。他们痛苦的呻吟在舰桥的扬声器中回荡着，无情地证明了黑暗灵族在消失前，对这些人施加了何等恐怖的折磨。

languages.text: Una inspección más cuidadosa del puente ayuda a convertir los indicios aislados en una explicación coherente. La nave fue víctima de los Drukhari: tras masacrar a los defensores, los xenos capturaron a toda la tripulación, a excepción de los oficiales. Sus gritos de dolor se repiten desde los altavoces del puente; un testamento desalmado de la espantosa tortura a la que los Drukhari sometieron a esta gente antes de desaparecer.
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

traits.locale_text: Una inspección más cuidadosa del puente ayuda a convertir los indicios aislados en una explicación coherente. La nave fue víctima de los Drukhari: tras masacrar a los defensores, los xenos capturaron a toda la tripulación, a excepción de los oficiales. Sus gritos de dolor se repiten desde los altavoces del puente; un testamento desalmado de la espantosa tortura a la que los Drukhari sometieron a esta gente antes de desaparecer.

languages.text: L'inspection approfondie de la passerelle permet de rassembler les pièces du puzzle et de révéler le drame qui s'est joué ici. Le vaisseau est tombé aux mains des Drukharis. Après avoir massacré les défenseurs, les xénos ont capturé tout l'équipage, à l'exception des officiers. Les échos de leurs gémissements de douleur résonnent à travers les haut-parleurs de la passerelle, témoignage désincarné des tortures épouvantables infligées par les Drukharis avant qu'ils ne disparaissent.
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

traits.locale_text: L'inspection approfondie de la passerelle permet de rassembler les pièces du puzzle et de révéler le drame qui s'est joué ici. Le vaisseau est tombé aux mains des Drukharis. Après avoir massacré les défenseurs, les xénos ont capturé tout l'équipage, à l'exception des officiers. Les échos de leurs gémissements de douleur résonnent à travers les haut-parleurs de la passerelle, témoignage désincarné des tortures épouvantables infligées par les Drukharis avant qu'ils ne disparaissent.

languages.text: Köprünün daha fazla incelenmesi, dağınık kanıtların eksiksiz bir resim hâlinde bir araya getirilmesine yardımcı oluyor. Gemi, Drukharilere kurban gitmiş. Zenolar, savunmacıları katlettikten sonra subaylar hariç tüm mürettebatı esir almış. Acı dolu iniltileri, köprü hoparlörlerinden yankılanıyor. Bu, Drukharilerin ortadan kaybolmadan önce insanlara uyguladığı korkunç işkencenin ruhsuz bir kanıtı.
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

traits.locale_text: Köprünün daha fazla incelenmesi, dağınık kanıtların eksiksiz bir resim hâlinde bir araya getirilmesine yardımcı oluyor. Gemi, Drukharilere kurban gitmiş. Zenolar, savunmacıları katlettikten sonra subaylar hariç tüm mürettebatı esir almış. Acı dolu iniltileri, köprü hoparlörlerinden yankılanıyor. Bu, Drukharilerin ortadan kaybolmadan önce insanlara uyguladığı korkunç işkencenin ruhsuz bir kanıtı.

languages.text: Nach einer eingehenden Inspektion der Brücke ergeben die verstreuten Hinweise ein Gesamtbild. Das Schiff fiel den Drukhari zum Opfer. Nachdem sie seine Verteidiger abgeschlachtet hatten, nahmen die Xenos die gesamte Crew mit Ausnahme der Offiziere gefangen. Ihr gequältes Stöhnen, das aus den Lautsprechern der Brücke ertönt, ist ein seelenloser Beleg für die schreckliche Folter, die den Leuten von den Drukhari vor ihrem Tod auferlegt wurde.
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.

traits.locale_text: Nach einer eingehenden Inspektion der Brücke ergeben die verstreuten Hinweise ein Gesamtbild. Das Schiff fiel den Drukhari zum Opfer. Nachdem sie seine Verteidiger abgeschlachtet hatten, nahmen die Xenos die gesamte Crew mit Ausnahme der Offiziere gefangen. Ihr gequältes Stöhnen, das aus den Lautsprechern der Brücke ertönt, ist ein seelenloser Beleg für die schreckliche Folter, die den Leuten von den Drukhari vor ihrem Tod auferlegt wurde.

languages.text: さらに調査を進めることで、散乱した証拠を繋ぎ合わせ、事件の全貌が見えてきた。この船はドルーカリに襲われ、防衛隊を虐殺した後に、乗組員全員を捕らえた。船長を除く。彼らの苦痛の声がブリッジのスピーカーから聞こえてくる。ドルーカリが人々に及ぼした恐ろしい拷問の証である。
languages.original_text: Further inspection of the bridge helps piece the scattered evidence together into a complete picture. The ship had fallen victim to the Drukhari — after slaughtering the defenders, the xenos had captured the entire crew, with the exception of the officers. Their moans of pain echo from the bridge speakers, a soulless testament to the horrific torture the Drukhari inflicted on the people before they vanished.
